Index.title: Industrial Precision | High-Precision Weights
Index.description: B2B solution for high-precision OIML weights and measurement standards.
Index.saveAndSee: Save and see your changes instantly.

About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: Precision. Standards. Integrity.
About.content: Founded with a singular focus on measurement accuracy, Industrial Precision provides OIML-certified weights for global industries. Our manufacturing process combines traditional metallurgical expertise with modern calibration technology.
About.mission_text: To set the global standard for measurement reliability through uncompromising precision engineering.

shipping.title: Shipping Policy
shipping.section1_text: We ship worldwide via DHL, FedEx, and specialized industrial freight carriers. All weights are securely packed in shock-resistant cases to maintain calibration integrity during transit.
shipping.section2_text: Standard items ship within 3-5 business days. Custom sets or high-precision E1 class weights requiring fresh calibration certificates may take 10-14 business days.
shipping.section3_text: The recipient is responsible for any import duties, taxes, or customs clearance fees applicable in the destination country.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1_text: We collect information necessary to process RFQs and orders, including company name, contact person, and email address. We do not sell or share this data with third parties.
privacy.section2_text: Your data is used exclusively for technical communication, quotation delivery, and order fulfillment. We use Google Analytics to monitor site performance anonymously.
privacy.section3_text: This site uses essential cookies for language preferences and performance monitoring via GA4.

warranty.title: Warranty Policy
warranty.section1_text: All precision weights are guaranteed against manufacturing defects for a period of 12 months from the date of delivery. This includes material integrity and initial calibration accuracy within OIML tolerances.
warranty.section2_text: Periodic recalibration is recommended annually. The warranty does not cover shifts in accuracy due to wear, contamination, or improper handling.
warranty.section3_text: Warranty claims must be submitted with original calibration certificates and photographic evidence of any visible defects.
